title: Golfo, Girl of the Mountains
actors: Antigoni Valakou, Georgios Glinos, Nikos Kazis
plot: At a village near the River Styx, Golfo and Tasos swear eternal devotion. But, when he breaks his oath for the sake of a spiteful woman, desperate Golfo contemplates death, and only he can save her. Will he see the error of his ways?
